findings.message: IP address 10.0.0.15 is assigned to 7 interfaces
findings.recommendation: Review IP address assignments and resolve the conflict. Each IP should be unique within a broadcast domain.
findings.title: Duplicate IP Address

findings.message: AAA new-model not enabled
findings.recommendation: Configure 'aaa new-model' to enable AAA services
findings.title: AAA New-Model Not Enabled

findings.message: SSH configuration incomplete
findings.recommendation: Configure 'ip ssh version 2', domain name, and SSH timeout ≤ 60s
findings.title: SSH Configuration Incomplete

findings.message: Local logging not properly configured
findings.recommendation: Configure 'logging on', 'logging buffered', and 'logging console critical'
findings.title: Local Logging Not Configured

findings.message: SNMP security issues detected
findings.recommendation: Remove default communities, restrict to RO with ACLs, configure SNMPv3
findings.title: SNMP Security Misconfiguration

findings.message: No remote syslog host configured
findings.recommendation: Configure 'logging host <ip>' for centralized log collection
findings.title: Remote Logging Not Configured

findings.message: AAA authentication not fully configured
findings.recommendation: Configure AAA authentication for login and enable modes
findings.title: AAA Authentication Not Configured

findings.message: Login event logging not configured
findings.recommendation: Configure login success/failure logging for audit trail
findings.title: Login Event Logging Not Configured

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/3: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/4: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/5: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/6: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/7: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: GigabitEthernet1/0/8: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: Loopback0: no interface description configured
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive label for operational documentation
findings.title: Interface No Description

findings.message: User 'admin' has privilege 15 (should be 1)
findings.recommendation: Set 'username <user> privilege 1'; use AAA/TACACS+ for admin access
findings.title: Local User Has Elevated Privilege

findings.message: VTY 0 4 — transport input is 'all' (should be 'ssh'); no access-class ACL configured
findings.recommendation: Configure 'transport input ssh' and 'access-class <ACL> in' on all VTY lines
findings.title: VTY Line Security Incomplete

findings.message: VTY 5 15 — no access-class ACL configured
findings.recommendation: Configure 'transport input ssh' and 'access-class <ACL> in' on all VTY lines
findings.title: VTY Line Security Incomplete

findings.message: Service hardening issues — CDP globally enabled; TCP keepalives-in not enabled; TCP keepalives-out not enabled
findings.recommendation: Run 'no cdp run', 'no ip bootp server', 'no service pad', 'service tcp-keepalives-in', 'service tcp-keepalives-out'
findings.title: Unnecessary Services Enabled

findings.message: IP source routing is enabled
findings.recommendation: Configure 'no ip source-route' to disable source routing
findings.title: IP Source Routing Enabled

findings.message: OSPF process 1 missing area authentication message-digest
findings.recommendation: Configure 'area <id> authentication message-digest' under OSPF process
findings.title: OSPF Authentication Not Configured

findings.message: Cis Xe 1 1 Acctg: aaa.accounting_configured=false — CIS requires AAA accounting on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS XE 1.1.6-1.1.10 L1 — Enable AAA accounting for commands, connection, exec, network, system
findings.title: Cis Xe 1 1 Acctg

key_facts.expected_value: [any] banner.login_present not_equals true, banner.motd_present not_equals true, banner.exec_present not_equals true

findings.message: Cis Xe 1 3 Banner: one or more required banners missing (login, motd, exec) on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS XE 1.3.1-1.3.4 L1 — Set banner text for exec, login, motd, and webauth
findings.title: Cis Xe 1 3 Banner

findings.message: Cis Xe 1 2 Http: plaintext HTTP server enabled — CIS requires 'no ip http server' on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS XE 1.2.9/1.2.10 L1 — Enable HTTPS-only management and set HTTP session timeout
findings.title: Cis Xe 1 2 Http

findings.message: Cis Xe 1 4 Passwords: service password-encryption not enabled on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS XE 1.4.1-1.4.3 L1 — enable secret, service password-encryption, username secret
findings.title: Cis Xe 1 4 Passwords

findings.message: NETCONF and RESTCONF enabled without ACL restriction
findings.recommendation: Restrict access with ACL: 'netconf-yang ssh access-list <acl>' and/or 'ip http access-class <acl>'
findings.title: NETCONF/RESTCONF Without ACL

findings.message: Ospf Interface Bfd Not Enabled: interface=GigabitEthernet1/0/1, bfd=disabled on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: BFD is not enabled on OSPF interface — link failures may take up to 40 seconds to detect
findings.title: Ospf Interface Bfd Not Enabled

findings.message: Ospf Interface No Authentication: interface=GigabitEthernet1/0/1, authentication=none on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: OSPF interface has no cryptographic authentication configured — route injection attacks possible
findings.title: Ospf Interface No Authentication

findings.message: Ospf Interface Ttl Security Not Enabled: interface=GigabitEthernet1/0/1, ttl_security=not configured on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: OSPF interface does not have TTL security (GTSM) enabled — off-link OSPF injection not blocked
findings.title: Ospf Interface Ttl Security Not Enabled

findings.message: Ospf Interface Bfd Not Enabled: interface=Vlan50, bfd=disabled on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: BFD is not enabled on OSPF interface — link failures may take up to 40 seconds to detect
findings.title: Ospf Interface Bfd Not Enabled

findings.message: Ospf Interface No Authentication: interface=Vlan50, authentication=none on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: OSPF interface has no cryptographic authentication configured — route injection attacks possible
findings.title: Ospf Interface No Authentication

findings.message: Ospf Interface Ttl Security Not Enabled: interface=Vlan50, ttl_security=not configured on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: OSPF interface does not have TTL security (GTSM) enabled — off-link OSPF injection not blocked
findings.title: Ospf Interface Ttl Security Not Enabled

findings.message: Ospf Graceful Restart Disabled: instance=1, graceful_restart=disabled on device acc-sw-01
findings.recommendation: OSPF Graceful Restart is not configured — process restarts will cause full reconvergence
findings.title: Ospf Graceful Restart Disabled

findings.message: No default route (0.0.0.0/0) in global table
findings.recommendation: Verify default route exists or is learned via IGP/BGP
findings.title: Default Route Missing

findings.message: acc-sw-01: global BPDU Guard is disabled
findings.recommendation: Enable with 'spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default'. Ensure PortFast is configured on all access ports first.
findings.title: STP BPDU Guard Disabled Globally

findings.message: acc-sw-01: global Loop Guard is disabled
findings.recommendation: Enable with 'spanning-tree loopguard default'. Protects against unidirectional fiber failures on uplink ports.
findings.title: STP Loop Guard Disabled Globally

findings.message: All 2 VLANs use default STP priority 32768 — no root bridge election
findings.recommendation: Configure explicit STP priority on designated root bridges (e.g., 'spanning-tree vlan <id> priority 4096')
findings.title: STP Priority Default

findings.recommendation: Configure 'aaa new-model' to enable AAA services
findings.title: AAA New-Model Not Enabled

findings.message: No default route (0.0.0.0/0) in global table
findings.recommendation: Verify default route exists or is learned via IGP/BGP
findings.title: Default Route Missing

findings.message: core-sw-01: global BPDU Guard is disabled
findings.recommendation: Enable with 'spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default'. Ensure PortFast is configured on all access ports first.
findings.title: STP BPDU Guard Disabled Globally

findings.message: core-sw-01: global Loop Guard is disabled
findings.recommendation: Enable with 'spanning-tree loopguard default'. Protects against unidirectional fiber failures on uplink ports.
findings.title: STP Loop Guard Disabled Globally

findings.message: All 3 VLANs use default STP priority 32768 — no root bridge election
findings.recommendation: Configure explicit STP priority on designated root bridges (e.g., 'spanning-tree vlan <id> priority 4096')
findings.title: STP Priority Default

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 1 1: pre-login-banner not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.1.1 L1 — Ensure 'Pre-Login Banner' is set
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 1 1

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 1 2: post-login-banner not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.1.2 L1 — Ensure 'Post-Login Banner' is set
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 1 2

findings.message: Firmware v7.4.12 build 2902 — manual review required
findings.recommendation: Verify firmware is current via FortiGuard advisory; update if needed
findings.title: Firmware Version Review Required

findings.recommendation: CIS 2.1.7 L2 — Disable USB firmware and configuration installation
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 1 7

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 1 8: ssl-static-key-ciphers not disabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.1.8 L2 — Disable static keys for TLS (ssl-static-key-ciphers=disable)
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 1 8

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 1 9: strong-crypto not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.1.9 L2 — Enable Global Strong Encryption (strong-crypto=enable)
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 1 9

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 2 1: password policy not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.2.1 L1 — Ensure Password Policy is enabled
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 2 1

findings.message: Admin 'admin' has no trusted hosts configured
findings.recommendation: Configure trusted hosts to restrict admin access by source IP
findings.title: Admin Account Missing Trusted Hosts

findings.message: All 1 admin account(s) use the super_admin profile — no least-privilege account exists
findings.recommendation: Create scoped (non-super_admin) accounts for day-to-day administration
findings.title: Admin Account with Super Admin Profile

findings.message: Interface 'port1' allows unencrypted protocols: ['http']
findings.recommendation: Remove HTTP and TELNET from allowaccess; use HTTPS and SSH only
findings.title: Interface Allows Unencrypted Management Access

findings.message: No local-in policies configured
findings.recommendation: Configure local-in policies to restrict management access by source
findings.title: No Local-In Policies Configured

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 5 1: HA mode is standalone, no high availability configured on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.5.1 L2 — Ensure High Availability is configured (mode, group, password, heartbeat)
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 5 1

findings.message: Cis Fg 2 5 3: HA reserved management interface not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 2.5.3 L1/L2 — Ensure HA Reserved Management Interface is configured
findings.title: Cis Fg 2 5 3

findings.message: Cis Fg 6 1 2: SSL VPN allows TLS versions below 1.2 on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 6.1.2 L2 — Enable limited TLS versions for SSL VPN (TLS 1.2 min, TLS 1.3 max)
findings.title: Cis Fg 6 1 2

findings.message: Cis Fg 8 2 1: FortiAnalyzer log encryption not set to high on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 8.2.1 L2 — Encrypt log transmission to FortiAnalyzer/FortiManager (enc-algorithm=high)
findings.title: Cis Fg 8 2 1

findings.message: Cis Fg 8 3 1: FortiAnalyzer centralized logging not enabled on device edge-fw-01
findings.recommendation: CIS 8.3.1 L2 — Enable Centralized Logging and Reporting to FortiAnalyzer
findings.title: Cis Fg 8 3 1

findings.message: CLI audit logging is disabled — no audit trail for admin commands
findings.recommendation: Enable CLI audit logging: 'config system global / set cli-audit-log enable'
findings.title: FortiGate CLI Audit Logging Disabled

findings.message: DNS query logging is disabled — no visibility into DNS resolution activity
findings.recommendation: Enable DNS logging: 'config system dns / set log enable'
findings.title: FortiGate DNS Logging Disabled

findings.message: NTP authentication is disabled — time source can be spoofed
findings.recommendation: Enable NTP authentication: 'config system ntp / set authentication enable / set key-type MD5 / set key <key>'
findings.title: FortiGate NTP Authentication Disabled

findings.message: Private-data-encryption is disabled — config secrets stored in plaintext
findings.recommendation: Enable private data encryption: 'config system global / set private-data-encryption enable'
findings.title: FortiGate Private Data Encryption Disabled

findings.message: 2 active accept policies have SSL inspection disabled — encrypted malware can pass through uninspected
findings.recommendation: Apply SSL deep inspection or certificate inspection profile to active accept policies
findings.title: FortiGate SSL Inspection Disabled on Policies
